debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝ : LinearOrder α
label : α
l : LabelledTree α
h : IsOrdered α inst✝ l
⊢ fastCheckMem α inst✝ label l = true ↔ label ∈ l

failed_attempts:
induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
      rcases h with ⟨hlv, hvr, hol, hor, hv⟩
      by_cases hEq : v = label
      · subst hEq
        simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
      · have hne : ¬ v == label := by
          simpa [BEq.beq, hEq] using congrArg (fun t => t) rfl
        by_cases hlt : label < v
        · have hnotinr : ¬ label ∈ right := by
            intro hr
            have : v ≤ label := hvr label hr
            exact (not_le_of_gt hlt) this
          have : fastCheckMem label (node v left right) = fastCheckMem label left := by
            simp [fastCheckMem, hEq, hlt]
          simp [LabelledTree.mem, this, ihl _ hol, hnotinr]
        · have hge : v ≤ label := le_of_not_gt hlt
          have hnotinl : ¬ label ∈ left := by
            intro hl
            have : label ≤ v := hlv label hl
            exact (not_lt_of_ge this) (lt_of_le_of_ne hge (Ne.symm hEq))
          have : fastCheckMem label (node v left right) = fastCheckMem label right := by
            simp [fastCheckMem, hEq, hlt]
          simp [LabelledTree.mem, this, ihr _ hor, hnotinl]

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      simp [fastCheckMem] at h ⊢
      by_cases hv : v = label
      · subst hv
        simp
      · have hv' : ¬ v == label := by
          simpa [beq_iff_eq, hv]
        simp [hv', ihL, ihR]
        constructor
        · intro ht
          by_cases hlt : label < v
          · have : label ∈ left := by simpa [hlt] using ht
            exact Or.inl this
          · have : label ∈ right := by simpa [hlt] using ht
            exact Or.inr this
        · intro hm
          by_cases hlt : label < v
          · have : label ∈ left := by
              cases hm with
              | inl hl => exact hl
              | inr hr =>
                  have hvle : v ≤ label := le_of_not_gt hlt
                  have hvr : ∀ x, x ∈ right → v ≤ x := h.2.1
                  have : v ≤ label := hvr label hr
                  exact (not_le_of_gt hlt) this |>.elim
            simpa [hlt] using (ihL h.2.2.1 this)
          · have : label ∈ right := by
              cases hm with
              | inr hr => exact hr
              | inl hl =>
                  have hvl : ∀ x, x ∈ left → x ≤ v := h.1
                  have : label ≤ v := hvl label hl
                  have : label < v := lt_of_le_of_ne this (Ne.symm hv)
                  exact (hlt this) |>.elim
            simpa [hlt] using (ihR h.2.2.2 this)

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      by_cases hv : v = label
      · subst hv
        have hvmem : v ∈ node v left right := by
          simpa [LabelledTree.mem]
        simp [fastCheckMem, hvmem]
      · have hvne : (v == label) = false := by
          simpa [Bool.beq_eq_false_iff, hv]
        have hleft : IsOrdered left := by
          simpa [IsOrdered] using h.2.2.1
        have hright : IsOrdered right := by
          simpa [IsOrdered] using h.2.2.2.1
        have hLle : ∀ x, x ∈ left → x ≤ v := by
          simpa [IsOrdered] using h.1
        have hRge : ∀ x, x ∈ right → v ≤ x := by
          simpa [IsOrdered] using h.2.1
        constructor
        · intro hf
          simp [fastCheckMem, hvne] at hf
          by_cases hlt : label < v
          · have : fastCheckMem label left = true := by simpa [hlt] using hf
            have : label ∈ left := (ihL hleft).1 this
            exact Or.inl this
          · have : fastCheckMem label right = true := by
              simpa [hlt] using hf
            have : label ∈ right := (ihR hright).1 this
            exact Or.inr this
        · intro hm
          simp [LabelledTree.mem] at hm
          simp [fastCheckMem, hvne]
          by_cases hlt : label < v
          · have : label ∈ left := by
              cases hm with
              | inl hl => exact hl
              | inr hr =>
                  have : v ≤ label := hRge label hr
                  exact False.elim (not_le_of_lt hlt this)
            have : fastCheckMem label left = true := (ihL hleft).2 this
            simpa [hlt] using this
          · have hge : v ≤ label := le_of_not_gt hlt
            have : label ∈ right := by
              cases hm with
              | inr hr => exact hr
              | inl hl =>
                  have : label ≤ v := hLle label hl
                  have : label = v := le_antisymm this hge
                  exact False.elim (hv this)
            have : fastCheckMem label right = true := (ihR hright).2 this
            simpa [hlt] using this

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
      rcases h with ⟨hl, hr, hol, hor, hv⟩
      by_cases hveq : v = label
      · subst hveq
        simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
      · have hvne : ¬ v == label := by
          simpa [beq_iff_eq, hveq]
        by_cases hlt : label < v
        · have hnotmemr : ¬ label ∈ right := by
            intro hmemr
            have := hr label hmemr
            exact (not_le_of_gt hlt) this
          have := (ihl hol).trans (by rfl)
          have := (ihl hol)
          simp [fastCheckMem, hvne, hlt, LabelledTree.mem, (ihl hol), hnotmemr]
        · have hge : v ≤ label := le_of_not_gt hlt
          have hnotmeml : ¬ label ∈ left := by
            intro hmeml
            have := hl label hmeml
            exact (not_le_of_gt (lt_of_le_of_ne hge (Ne.symm hveq))) this
          simp [fastCheckMem, hvne, hlt, LabelledTree.mem, (ihr hor), hnotmeml]

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      have hl : IsOrdered left := (h.2.2).1
      have hr : IsOrdered right := (h.2.2).2.1
      constructor
      · intro hfc
        by_cases hv : v = label
        · subst hv
          simpa [fastCheckMem]
        · have hv' : ¬ v == label := by
            simpa [BEq.beq, instBEq, hv] using congrArg (fun t => t) (rfl : (v == label) = (v == label))
          simp [fastCheckMem, hv, hv'] at hfc
          by_cases hlt : label < v
          · have : fastCheckMem label left = true := by
              simpa [hlt] using hfc
            have : label ∈ left := (ihL hl).1 this
            exact Or.inl this
          · have : fastCheckMem label right = true := by
              simpa [hlt] using hfc
            have : label ∈ right := (ihR hr).1 this
            exact Or.inr this
      · intro hmem
        by_cases hv : v = label
        · subst hv
          simp [fastCheckMem]
        · have hv' : ¬ v == label := by
            simpa [BEq.beq, instBEq, hv] using congrArg (fun t => t) (rfl : (v == label) = (v == label))
          cases hmem with
          | inl hlm =>
              have hle : label ≤ v := h.1 label hlm
              have hlt_or_eq := lt_or_eq_of_le hle
              have hlt : label < v := by
                cases hlt_or_eq with
                | inl hlt => exact hlt
                | inr heq => cases hv (heq.symm)
              have : fastCheckMem label left = true := (ihL hl).2 hlm
              simp [fastCheckMem, hv, hv', hlt, this]
          | inr hrm =>
              have hge : v ≤ label := (h.2.1) label hrm
              have hlt : ¬ label < v := by
                exact not_lt_of_ge hge
              have : fastCheckMem label right = true := (ihR hr).2 hrm
              simp [fastCheckMem, hv, hv', hlt, this]

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      rcases h with ⟨hl, hr, hOl, hOr, hv⟩
      by_cases hveq : v = label
      · subst hveq
        have : (label ∈ LabelledTree.node v left right) := by
          simpa [LabelledTree.mem] using hv
        simp [fastCheckMem, this]
      · have hvne : ¬ (v == label) = true := by
          simpa [beq_iff_eq, hveq] using congrArg (fun t => t == label) (rfl : v = v)
        by_cases hlt : label < v
        · have hnotinR : ¬ label ∈ right := by
            intro hmem
            have : v ≤ label := hr label hmem
            exact (not_lt_of_ge this) hlt
          have : (label ∈ LabelledTree.node v left right) ↔ label ∈ left := by
            simp [LabelledTree.mem, hnotinR]
          have hOleft : IsOrdered left := hOl
          simpa [fastCheckMem, beq_iff_eq, hveq, hlt, this] using (ihL hOleft)
        · have hge : v ≤ label := le_of_not_gt hlt
          have hnotinL : ¬ label ∈ left := by
            intro hmem
            have : label ≤ v := hl label hmem
            exact (not_lt_of_ge this) (lt_of_lt_of_le (lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_eq rfl) (Ne.symm hveq)) hge)
          have hnotlt : ¬ label < v := by
            exact hlt
          have hnotinL' : ¬ label ∈ left := by
            intro hmem
            have : label ≤ v := hl label hmem
            exact (not_lt_of_ge this) (lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_eq rfl) (Ne.symm hveq))
          have : (label ∈ LabelledTree.node v left right) ↔ label ∈ right := by
            have : ¬ label ∈ left := by
              intro hmem
              have : label ≤ v := hl label hmem
              exact (not_lt_of_ge this) (lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_eq rfl) (Ne.symm hveq))
            simp [LabelledTree.mem, this]
          have hOright : IsOrdered right := hOr
          simpa [fastCheckMem, beq_iff_eq, hveq, hlt, this] using (ihR hOright)

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      have hL : IsOrdered left := by
        simpa [IsOrdered] using (h.2.2.1)
      have hR : IsOrdered right := by
        simpa [IsOrdered] using (h.2.2.2.1)
      have hleft : ∀ x, x ∈ left → x ≤ v := by
        simpa [IsOrdered] using (h.1)
      have hright : ∀ x, x ∈ right → v ≤ x := by
        simpa [IsOrdered] using (h.2.1)
      by_cases hv : v = label
      · subst hv
        have : label ∈ left ∨ label ∈ right := by
          simpa [IsOrdered] using (h.2.2.2.2)
        constructor
        · intro _
          simpa using this
        · intro _
          simp [fastCheckMem]
      · have hv' : ¬ v == label := by
          simpa [beq_iff_eq] using hv
        have hv'' : ¬ label = v := by
          exact fun hl => hv (hl.symm)
        by_cases hlv : label < v
        · constructor
          · intro hf
            have : fastCheckMem label left = true := by
              simpa [fastCheckMem, hv', hlv] using hf
            have : label ∈ left := (ihL hL).1 this
            exact Or.inl this
          · intro hm
            have : label ∈ left := by
              rcases hm with hm | hm
              · exact hm
              · exfalso
                have : v ≤ label := hright label hm
                exact (not_le_of_lt hlv) this
            have : fastCheckMem label left = true := (ihL hL).2 this
            simpa [fastCheckMem, hv', hlv] using this
        · have hge : v < label := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_gt hlv) hv''
          have hnotlt : ¬ label < v := hlv
          constructor
          · intro hf
            have : fastCheckMem label right = true := by
              simpa [fastCheckMem, hv', hnotlt] using hf
            have : label ∈ right := (ihR hR).1 this
            exact Or.inr this
          · intro hm
            have : label ∈ right := by
              rcases hm with hm | hm
              · exfalso
                have : label ≤ v := hleft label hm
                exact (not_le_of_lt hge) this
              · exact hm
            have : fastCheckMem label right = true := (ihR hR).2 this
            simpa [fastCheckMem, hv', hnotlt] using this

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      rcases h with ⟨hl, hr, hOl, hOr, hv⟩
      constructor
      · intro hfc
        by_cases hEq : v = label
        · right
          have : v ∈ right := by
            have : v ∈ left ∨ v ∈ right := hv
            simpa [LabelledTree.mem, hEq] using this
          simpa [LabelledTree.mem, hEq] using this
        · have hEq' : (v == label) = false := by
            simp [BEq.beq, hEq]
          have hfc' : (if v == label then true else if label < v then fastCheckMem label left else fastCheckMem label right) = true := by
            simpa [fastCheckMem] using hfc
          simp [hEq'] at hfc'
          by_cases hlt : label < v
          · have : fastCheckMem label left = true := by simpa [hlt] using hfc'
            have : label ∈ left := (ihL hOl).1 this
            left; exact this
          · have : fastCheckMem label right = true := by simpa [hlt] using hfc'
            have : label ∈ right := (ihR hOr).1 this
            right; exact this
      · intro hmem
        by_cases hEq : v = label
        · simp [fastCheckMem, hEq]
        · have hEq' : (v == label) = false := by
            simp [BEq.beq, hEq]
          have : label ∈ left ∨ label ∈ right := by
            simpa [LabelledTree.mem] using hmem
          cases this with
          | inl hL =>
              have : fastCheckMem label left = true := (ihL hOl).2 hL
              have hlt : label < v := by
                have := hl label hL
                exact lt_of_le_of_ne this (Ne.symm hEq)
              simp [fastCheckMem, hEq', hlt, this]
          | inr hR =>
              have : fastCheckMem label right = true := (ihR hOr).2 hR
              have hnotlt : ¬ label < v := by
                intro hlt
                have : label ≤ v := le_of_lt hlt
                have : v ≤ label := hr label hR
                have : v = label := le_antisymm this ‹v ≤ label›
                exact hEq this.symm
              simp [fastCheckMem, hEq', hnotlt, this]

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      rcases h with ⟨hl, hr, hOL, hOR, hv⟩
      by_cases hveq : v = label
      · subst hveq
        simp [fastCheckMem, hv]
      · have hvne : ¬ (v = label) := hveq
        have hEqFalse : (v == label) = false := by
          simpa [beq_iff_eq, hvne] using (rfl : (v == label) = (v == label))
        by_cases hlt : label < v
        · have hmemr : ¬ label ∈ right := by
            intro hm
            have : v ≤ label := hr label hm
            exact not_lt_of_ge this hlt
          have : fastCheckMem label (node v left right) = true ↔ label ∈ left := by
            simp [fastCheckMem, beq_iff_eq, hvne, hlt, ihL label hOL, LabelledTree.mem, hmemr]
          simpa [LabelledTree.mem] using this
        · have hge : v ≤ label := le_of_not_gt hlt
          have hmeml : ¬ label ∈ left := by
            intro hm
            have : label ≤ v := hl label hm
            exact (not_lt_of_ge this) (lt_of_le_of_ne hge (Ne.symm hvne))
          have : fastCheckMem label (node v left right) = true ↔ label ∈ right := by
            simp [fastCheckMem, beq_iff_eq, hvne, hlt, ihR label hOR, LabelledTree.mem, hmeml]
          simpa [LabelledTree.mem] using this

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      by_cases hv : v = label
      · subst hv
        simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
      · have hv' : (v == label) = false := by
          simp [BEq.beq, hv]
        have hleft : IsOrdered left := by
          simpa [IsOrdered] using h.2.2.2.1
        have hright : IsOrdered right := by
          simpa [IsOrdered] using h.2.2.2.2.1
        by_cases hlt : label < v
        · have hnmemR : label ∉ right := by
            intro hm
            have : v ≤ label := h.2.1 label hm
            exact (not_le_of_lt hlt) this
          constructor
          · intro ht
            have : fastCheckMem label left = true := by
              simpa [fastCheckMem, hv', hlt] using ht
            have : label ∈ left := (ihL hleft).1 this
            exact Or.inl this
          · intro hm
            have : label ∈ left := by
              cases hm with
              | inl hml => exact hml
              | inr hmr => exact False.elim (hnmemR hmr)
            have : fastCheckMem label left = true := (ihL hleft).2 this
            simpa [fastCheckMem, hv', hlt] using this
        · have hge : v ≤ label := le_of_not_gt hlt
          have hnmemL : label ∉ left := by
            intro hm
            have : label ≤ v := h.1 label hm
            exact (not_lt_of_ge hge) (lt_of_le_of_ne this (Ne.symm hv))
          constructor
          · intro ht
            have : fastCheckMem label right = true := by
              simpa [fastCheckMem, hv', hlt] using ht
            have : label ∈ right := (ihR hright).1 this
            exact Or.inr this
          · intro hm
            have : label ∈ right := by
              cases hm with
              | inl hml => exact False.elim (hnmemL hml)
              | inr hmr => exact hmr
            have : fastCheckMem label right = true := (ihR hright).2 this
            simpa [fastCheckMem, hv', hlt] using this

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      rcases h with ⟨hl, hr, hOL, hOR, hv⟩
      constructor
      · intro hf
        by_cases hveq : v = label
        · subst hveq
          exact hv
        · have hvne : v ≠ label := by exact hveq
          have hneq : ¬ v == label := by simpa [beq_iff_eq, hvne]
          have hf' : (if v == label then true else if label < v then fastCheckMem label left else fastCheckMem label right) = true := by
            simpa [fastCheckMem, hneq] using hf
          by_cases hlt : label < v
          · have : fastCheckMem label left = true := by simpa [hlt] using hf'
            have : label ∈ left := (ihL hOL).1 this
            exact Or.inl this
          · have : fastCheckMem label right = true := by simpa [hlt] using hf'
            have : label ∈ right := (ihR hOR).1 this
            exact Or.inr this
      · intro hm
        by_cases hveq : v = label
        · subst hveq
          simp [fastCheckMem]
        · have hvne : v ≠ label := by exact hveq
          have hneq : ¬ v == label := by simpa [beq_iff_eq, hvne]
          have hvnot : v ∉ left ∧ v ∉ right := by
            constructor
            · intro hvL
              exact hvne (le_antisymm (hl v hvL) (hl label hvL))
            · intro hvR
              exact hvne (le_antisymm (hr label hvR) (hr v hvR))
          cases hm with
          | inl hmemL =>
              have hle : label ≤ v := hl label hmemL
              have hnotlt : ¬ v < label := by exact not_lt_of_ge hle
              have hlt : label < v := lt_of_le_of_ne hle (Ne.symm hvne)
              have : fastCheckMem label left = true := (ihL hOL).2 hmemL
              simp [fastCheckMem, hneq, hlt, this]
          | inr hmemR =>
              have hge : v ≤ label := hr label hmemR
              have hnotlt : ¬ label < v := by exact not_lt_of_ge hge
              have : fastCheckMem label right = true := (ihR hOR).2 hmemR
              simp [fastCheckMem, hneq, hnotlt, this]

classical
  induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      dsimp [IsOrdered] at h
      rcases h with ⟨hleft, hright, hOL, hOR, hv⟩
      by_cases hveq : v = label
      · subst hveq
        simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, BEq.beq, hv]
      · have hvne : ¬ v = label := hveq
        have hbeq : (v == label) = false := by
          simp [BEq.beq, hvne]
        have hmem_ne : label ∈ node v left right ↔ label ∈ left ∨ label ∈ right := by
          simp [LabelledTree.mem]
        by_cases hlt : label < v
        · have hnotRight : ¬ label ∈ right := by
            intro hr
            have : v ≤ label := hright label hr
            exact not_lt_of_ge this hlt
          have : (fastCheckMem label (node v left right) = true ↔ label ∈ left) := by
            simp [fastCheckMem, hbeq, hlt, ihL, hOL]
          constructor
          · intro hf
            have hl : label ∈ left := (this.mp hf)
            exact (by simpa [LabelledTree.mem, hl, hnotRight] using (Or.inl hl : label ∈ left ∨ label ∈ right))
          · intro hm
            have : label ∈ left := by
              simpa [LabelledTree.mem] using hm
            exact this.mpr this
        · have hge : v ≤ label := le_of_not_gt hlt
          have hnotLeft : ¬ label ∈ left := by
            intro hl
            have : label ≤ v := hleft label hl
            have : label = v := le_antisymm this hge
            exact hvne this.symm
          have : (fastCheckMem label (node v left right) = true ↔ label ∈ right) := by
            have : ¬ label < v := hlt
            simp [fastCheckMem, hbeq, this, ihR, hOR]
          constructor
          · intro hf
            have hr : label ∈ right := (this.mp hf)
            exact (by simpa [LabelledTree.mem, hnotLeft, hr] using (Or.inr hr : label ∈ left ∨ label ∈ right))
          · intro hm
            have : label ∈ right := by
              have : label ∈ left ∨ label ∈ right := by
                simpa [LabelledTree.mem] using hm
              exact this.resolve_left hnotLeft
            exact this.mpr this

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem] at *
      rcases h with ⟨hl, hr, hOl, hOr, hv⟩
      by_cases hEq : v = label
      · subst hEq
        simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, hv]
      · have hne : ¬(v == label) := by simpa [beq_iff_eq] using hEq
        simp [fastCheckMem, hne, beq_iff_eq] at *
        by_cases hlt : label < v
        · have hnotinR : ¬ LabelledTree.mem right label := by
            intro hm
            have : v ≤ label := hr label hm
            exact not_lt_of_ge this hlt
          have : fastCheckMem label left = true ↔ LabelledTree.mem left label := ihL hOl
          simpa [hlt, hnotinR, this]
        · have hge : v ≤ label := by
            have : ¬ label < v := hlt
            exact le_of_not_gt this
          have hnotinL : ¬ LabelledTree.mem left label := by
            intro hm
            have : label ≤ v := hl label hm
            exact not_lt_of_ge this (lt_of_le_of_ne hge (Ne.symm hEq))
          have : fastCheckMem label right = true ↔ LabelledTree.mem right label := ihR hOr
          have hlt' : ¬ label < v := hlt
          simpa [hlt', hnotinL, this]

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      by_cases hEq : v = label
      · subst hEq
        have hv : v ∈ LabelledTree.node v left right := by
          have : v ∈ left ∨ v ∈ right := (by simpa [IsOrdered] using h).2.2.2.2.2
          simpa [LabelledTree.mem]
        constructor
        · intro _
          exact hv
        · intro _
          simpa [fastCheckMem, BEq.beq, decide_eq_true_eq] using (show (v == v) = true from by simp)
      · have hbeq : (v == label) = false := by
          simp [BEq.beq, decide_eq_false_iff, hEq]
        have hleft_le : ∀ x, x ∈ left → x ≤ v := (by simpa [IsOrdered] using h).1
        have hright_ge : ∀ x, x ∈ right → v ≤ x := (by simpa [IsOrdered] using h).2.1
        have hOrdL : IsOrdered left := (by simpa [IsOrdered] using h).2.2.2.1
        have hOrdR : IsOrdered right := (by simpa [IsOrdered] using h).2.2.2.2.1
        by_cases hlt : label < v
        · have hnmemR : label ∈ right ↔ False := by
            constructor
            · intro hr
              have : v ≤ label := hright_ge label hr
              exact (not_le_of_gt hlt) this
            · intro hf; cases hf
          simp [fastCheckMem, hbeq, hlt, LabelledTree.mem, ihL _ hOrdL, hnmemR]
        · have hge : v ≤ label := le_of_not_gt hlt
          have hnmemL : label ∈ left ↔ False := by
            constructor
            · intro hl
              have : label ≤ v := hleft_le label hl
              exact (not_lt_of_ge hge) (lt_of_le_of_ne this (Ne.symm hEq))
            · intro hf; cases hf
          have hif : (if label < v then fastCheckMem label left else fastCheckMem label right)
              = fastCheckMem label right := by
                simp [hlt]
          simp [fastCheckMem, hbeq, hlt, LabelledTree.mem, ihR _ hOrdR, hnmemL, hif]

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      have hLmem : ∀ x, x ∈ left → x ≤ v := h.1
      have hRmem : ∀ x, x ∈ right → v ≤ x := h.2.1
      have hLord : IsOrdered left := h.2.2.1
      have hRord : IsOrdered right := h.2.2.2.1
      by_cases hv : v = label
      · subst hv
        simp [fastCheckMem]
      · have hv' : ¬ v == label := by simpa [beq_iff_eq, hv]
        by_cases hlt : label < v
        · have hnmemR : ¬ label ∈ right := by
            intro hr
            have : v ≤ label := hRmem label hr
            exact (not_lt_of_ge this) hlt
          have : fastCheckMem label (node v left right) = fastCheckMem label left := by
            simp [fastCheckMem, hv', hlt]
          simp [LabelledTree.mem, this, ihL label hLord, hnmemR]
        · have hge : v ≤ label := le_of_not_gt hlt
          have hnmemL : ¬ label ∈ left := by
            intro hl
            have : label ≤ v := hLmem label hl
            exact (not_lt_of_ge this) (lt_of_lt_of_le (lt_of_le_of_ne hge (Ne.symm hv)) (le_rfl))
          have : fastCheckMem label (node v left right) = fastCheckMem label right := by
            simp [fastCheckMem, hv', hlt]
          simp [LabelledTree.mem, this, ihR label hRord, hnmemL]

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      have hv : v ∈ left ∨ v ∈ right := by
        simpa [IsOrdered] using h
      have hL : IsOrdered left := by
        simpa [IsOrdered] using h
      have hR : IsOrdered right := by
        simpa [IsOrdered] using h
      have hleft : ∀ x, x ∈ left → x ≤ v := by
        simpa [IsOrdered] using h
      have hright : ∀ x, x ∈ right → v ≤ x := by
        simpa [IsOrdered] using h
      by_cases heq : v = label
      · have : label ∈ left ∨ label ∈ right := by
          simpa [heq] using hv
        simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, heq, this]
      · have hne' : ¬(v == label) = true := by
          simpa [beq_iff_eq, heq] using (show ¬ v = label from by simpa [eq_comm] using heq)
        have hbeq : (v == label) = false := by
          simpa [Bool.eq_false_iff] using (by
            intro ht
            have : v = label := by simpa [beq_iff_eq] using ht
            exact heq this)
        have hlt_or_gt : label < v ∨ v < label := lt_or_gt_of_ne (Ne.symm heq)
        cases hlt_or_gt with
        | inl hlt =>
            have hnright : ¬ label ∈ right := by
              intro hrmem
              have : v ≤ label := hright label hrmem
              exact (not_le_of_gt hlt) this
            have : label ∈ left ↔ label ∈ left ∨ label ∈ right := by
              constructor
              · intro hlmem; exact Or.inl hlmem
              · intro hm; cases hm with
                | inl hlmem => exact hlmem
                | inr hrmem => exact False.elim (hnright hrmem)
            simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, hbeq, hlt, ihL hL, this]
        | inr hgt =>
            have hnleft : ¬ label ∈ left := by
              intro hlmem
              have : label ≤ v := hleft label hlmem
              exact (not_le_of_gt hgt) this
            have : label ∈ right ↔ label ∈ left ∨ label ∈ right := by
              constructor
              · intro hrmem; exact Or.inr hrmem
              · intro hm; cases hm with
                | inl hlmem => exact False.elim (hnleft hlmem)
                | inr hrmem => exact hrmem
            have hnotlt : ¬ label < v := by exact not_lt_of_gt hgt
            simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, hbeq, hnotlt, ihR hR, this]

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      rcases h with ⟨hlv, hvr, hleft, hright, hv⟩
      by_cases hvEq : v = label
      · subst hvEq
        have : fastCheckMem α inst✝ v (node v left right) = true := by
          simp [fastCheckMem]
        have : v ∈ (node v left right) := by
          simpa using hv
        simpa [this] using (Iff.intro (fun _ => this) (fun _ => by simp [fastCheckMem]))
      · have hvNe : ¬v = label := hvEq
        have hvNe' : ¬v == label := by
          simpa [BEq.beq, instBEq] using hvNe
        by_cases hlt : label < v
        · have hnotinR : ¬ label ∈ right := by
            intro hmemR
            have : v ≤ label := hvr label hmemR
            exact (not_le_of_gt hlt) this
          constructor
          · intro hf
            have hf' : fastCheckMem α inst✝ label left = true := by
              simp [fastCheckMem, hvNe, hlt] at hf
              exact hf
            have : label ∈ left := (ihL hleft).1 hf'
            exact Or.inl this
          · intro hm
            have : label ∈ left := by
              cases hm with
              | inl hL => exact hL
              | inr hR => exact False.elim (hnotinR hR)
            have hf' : fastCheckMem α inst✝ label left = true := (ihL hleft).2 this
            simp [fastCheckMem, hvNe, hlt, hf']
        · have hge : v < label := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_gt hlt) (Ne.symm hvNe)
          have hnotinL : ¬ label ∈ left := by
            intro hmemL
            have : label ≤ v := hlv label hmemL
            exact (not_le_of_gt hge) this
          constructor
          · intro hf
            have hf' : fastCheckMem α inst✝ label right = true := by
              simp [fastCheckMem, hvNe, hlt] at hf
              exact hf
            have : label ∈ right := (ihR hright).1 hf'
            exact Or.inr this
          · intro hm
            have : label ∈ right := by
              cases hm with
              | inl hL => exact False.elim (hnotinL hL)
              | inr hR => exact hR
            have hf' : fastCheckMem α inst✝ label right = true := (ihR hright).2 this
            simp [fastCheckMem, hvNe, hlt, hf']

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      have hvL : ∀ x, x ∈ left → x ≤ v := h.1
      have hvR : ∀ x, x ∈ right → v ≤ x := h.2.1
      have hOL : IsOrdered left := h.2.2.1
      have hOR : IsOrdered right := h.2.2.2.1
      by_cases hEq : v = label
      · subst hEq
        simp [fastCheckMem, ihL, ihR]
      · have hne : ¬ v == label := by
          simpa [BEq.beq, hEq] using congrArg (fun t => t) rfl
        have hne' : (v == label) = false := by
          simp [BEq.beq, hEq]
        by_cases hlt : label < v
        · constructor
          · intro hf
            simp [fastCheckMem, hne', hlt, ihL, hOL] at hf
            have : label ∈ left := hf
            exact Or.inl this
          · intro hm
            have : label ∈ left := by
              cases hm with
              | inl hl => exact hl
              | inr hr =>
                  have : v ≤ label := hvR label hr
                  exact False.elim (not_le_of_gt hlt this)
            simp [fastCheckMem, hne', hlt, ihL, hOL, this]
        · have hge : v < label := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_gt hlt) (Ne.symm hEq)
          constructor
          · intro hf
            simp [fastCheckMem, hne', hlt, ihR, hOR] at hf
            have : label ∈ right := hf
            exact Or.inr this
          · intro hm
            have : label ∈ right := by
              cases hm with
              | inr hr => exact hr
              | inl hl =>
                  have : label ≤ v := hvL label hl
                  exact False.elim (not_le_of_gt hge this)
            simp [fastCheckMem, hne', hlt, ihR, hOR, this]

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
      simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem] at *
      have hv : (∀ x, x ∈ left → x ≤ v) := h.1
      have hr : (∀ x, x ∈ right → v ≤ x) := h.2.1
      have hol : IsOrdered left := h.2.2.1
      have hor : IsOrdered right := h.2.2.2.1
      by_cases hEq : v = label
      · subst hEq
        simp [fastCheckMem]
      · have hNe' : ¬v == label := by
          simpa [beq_iff_eq] using hEq
        simp [fastCheckMem, hNe']
        by_cases hlt : label < v
        · have hnotmemr : ¬ label ∈ right := by
            intro hm
            have : v ≤ label := hr label hm
            exact (not_le_of_gt hlt) this
          have : (label ∈ left ∨ label ∈ right) ↔ label ∈ left := by
            constructor
            · intro hm; exact hm.elim (fun hl => hl) (fun hrm => False.elim (hnotmemr hrm))
            · intro hm; exact Or.inl hm
          simp [hlt, ihl _ hol, this]
        · have hge : v ≤ label := le_of_not_gt hlt
          have hnotmeml : ¬ label ∈ left := by
            intro hm
            have : label ≤ v := hv label hm
            exact (not_lt_of_ge (le_trans hge this)) (lt_irrefl label)
          have : (label ∈ left ∨ label ∈ right) ↔ label ∈ right := by
            constructor
            · intro hm; exact hm.elim (fun hlm => False.elim (hnotmeml hlm)) (fun hrm => hrm)
            · intro hm; exact Or.inr hm
          have hif : (if label < v then fastCheckMem label left else fastCheckMem label right) =
              fastCheckMem label right := by
            simp [hlt]
          simp [hlt, ihr _ hor, this]

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      have hL : IsOrdered left := by
        simpa [IsOrdered] using h.2.2.1
      have hR : IsOrdered right := by
        simpa [IsOrdered] using h.2.2.2.1
      by_cases hv : v = label
      · subst hv
        simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
      · have : (v == label) = false := by
          simp [BEq.beq, hv]
        by_cases hlt : label < v
        · simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, this, hlt, ihL, hL]
        · have hge : v ≤ label := le_of_not_gt hlt
          have hnlt : (label < v) = false := by simp [lt_of_le_of_ne hge (Ne.symm hv)]
          simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, this, hnlt, ihR, hR]

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      simp [fastCheckMem] at *
      by_cases hv : v = label
      · subst hv
        have : label ∈ left ∨ label ∈ right := by
          simpa [IsOrdered] using h.2.2.2.2
        simp [this]
      · have hv' : (v == label) = false := by
          simp [beq_iff_eq, hv]
        have hleft : IsOrdered left := by
          simpa [IsOrdered] using h.2.2.2.1
        have hright : IsOrdered right := by
          simpa [IsOrdered] using h.2.2.2.2.1
        have hle : ∀ x ∈ left, x ≤ v := by
          simpa [IsOrdered] using h.1
        have hge : ∀ x ∈ right, v ≤ x := by
          simpa [IsOrdered] using h.2.1
        by_cases hlt : label < v
        · have : label ∈ right ↔ False := by
            constructor
            · intro hr
              have : v ≤ label := hge label hr
              exact (not_le_of_gt hlt) this
            · intro hf; cases hf
          simp [hv', hlt, ihL label hleft, this]
        · have hge' : v ≤ label := le_of_not_gt hlt
          have : label ∈ left ↔ False := by
            constructor
            · intro hl
              have : label ≤ v := hle label hl
              exact (not_lt_of_ge hge') (lt_of_le_of_ne this (Ne.symm hv))
            · intro hf; cases hf
          have hlt' : (label < v) = false := by
            exact propext ⟨fun h => (hlt h).elim, fun _ => False.elim⟩
          simp [hv', hlt', ihR label hright, this]

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      have h₁ : ∀ x, x ∈ left → x ≤ v := h.1
      have h₂ : ∀ x, x ∈ right → v ≤ x := h.2.1
      have hL : IsOrdered left := h.2.2.1
      have hR : IsOrdered right := h.2.2.2.1
      have hv : v ∈ left ∨ v ∈ right := h.2.2.2.2
      by_cases hvlabel : v = label
      · subst hvlabel
        have : (label ∈ left ∨ label ∈ right) := hv
        have : label ∈ node v left right := by simpa [LabelledTree.mem] using this
        constructor
        · intro _
          exact this
        · intro _
          simp [fastCheckMem]
      · have hvne : ¬ v = label := hvlabel
        have hvb : (v == label) = false := by
          simp [beq_iff_eq, hvne]
        by_cases hlt : label < v
        · have hnotinR : label ∈ right → False := by
            intro hr
            have : v ≤ label := h₂ label hr
            exact (not_le_of_gt hlt) this
          constructor
          · intro hf
            have hf' : fastCheckMem label left = true := by
              simpa [fastCheckMem, hvb, hlt] using hf
            have hmL : label ∈ left := (ihL hL).1 hf'
            exact Or.inl hmL
          · intro hm
            have hmL : label ∈ left := by
              cases hm with
              | inl hmL => exact hmL
              | inr hmR => exact False.elim (hnotinR hmR)
            have hf' : fastCheckMem label left = true := (ihL hL).2 hmL
            simpa [fastCheckMem, hvb, hlt] using hf'
        · have hge : v ≤ label := le_of_not_gt hlt
          have hnotinL : label ∈ left → False := by
            intro hl
            have : label ≤ v := h₁ label hl
            exact (not_le_of_gt (lt_of_le_of_ne hge (Ne.symm hvne))) this
          constructor
          · intro hf
            have hf' : fastCheckMem label right = true := by
              simpa [fastCheckMem, hvb, hlt] using hf
            have hmR : label ∈ right := (ihR hR).1 hf'
            exact Or.inr hmR
          · intro hm
            have hmR : label ∈ right := by
              cases hm with
              | inl hmL => exact False.elim (hnotinL hmL)
              | inr hmR => exact hmR
            have hf' : fastCheckMem label right = true := (ihR hR).2 hmR
            simpa [fastCheckMem, hvb, hlt] using hf'

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
      rcases h with ⟨hL, hR, hOl, hOr, hv⟩
      by_cases hEq : v = label
      · subst hEq
        simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
      · have hne : ¬ v == label := by
          simpa [beq_iff_eq] using hEq
        simp [fastCheckMem, hne, LabelledTree.mem]
        by_cases hlt : label < v
        · have hnotinR : ¬ label ∈ right := by
            intro hr
            have : v ≤ label := hR label hr
            exact (not_lt_of_ge this) hlt
          simp [hlt, ihl hOl, hnotinR]
        · have hge : v ≤ label := le_of_not_gt hlt
          have hnotinL : ¬ label ∈ left := by
            intro hl
            have : label ≤ v := hL label hl
            exact (not_le_of_gt (lt_of_le_of_ne hge (Ne.symm hEq))) this
          have hlt' : ¬ label < v := hlt
          simp [hlt', ihr hOr, hnotinL]

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      rcases h with ⟨hl, hr, hOl, hOr, hv⟩
      by_cases hEq : v = label
      · subst hEq
        simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
      · have hne : (v == label) = false := by
          simp [beq_iff_eq, hEq]
        have hEq' : (v == label) = false := hne
        by_cases hlt : label < v
        · have hmemR : label ∈ right → False := by
            intro hmem
            have : v ≤ label := hr label hmem
            exact (not_le_of_gt hlt) this
          have hmemR' : (label ∈ right) = False := by
            apply propext (Iff.intro (fun h => False.elim (hmemR h)) (fun h => False.elim h))
          have hOleft : IsOrdered left := hOl
          simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, hEq', hlt, ihL label hOleft, hmemR]
        · have hge : v ≤ label := le_of_not_gt hlt
          have hmemL : label ∈ left → False := by
            intro hmem
            have : label ≤ v := hl label hmem
            exact (not_lt_of_ge hge) (lt_of_le_of_ne this (Ne.symm hEq))
          have hOright : IsOrdered right := hOr
          simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, hEq', hlt, ihR label hOright, hmemL]

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      have hL_le : ∀ x ∈ left, x ≤ v := (by simpa [IsOrdered] using h).1
      have hV_leR : ∀ x ∈ right, v ≤ x := (by
        have := (by simpa [IsOrdered] using h).2.1
        exact this)
      have hL_ord : IsOrdered left := (by
        have := (by simpa [IsOrdered] using h).2.2.1
        exact this)
      have hR_ord : IsOrdered right := (by
        have := (by simpa [IsOrdered] using h).2.2.2.1
        exact this)
      by_cases hv : v = label
      · subst hv
        simp [fastCheckMem]
      · have hv' : ¬ v = label := hv
        have hbeq : (v == label) = false := by simpa [beq_iff_eq] using hv'
        by_cases hlt : label < v
        · have hnotR : ¬ label ∈ right := by
            intro hm
            have : v ≤ label := hV_leR label hm
            exact (not_lt_of_ge this) hlt
          simp [fastCheckMem, hbeq, hlt, ihL label hL_ord, LabelledTree.mem, hnotR]
        · have hge : v ≤ label := le_of_not_gt hlt
          have hnotL : ¬ label ∈ left := by
            intro hm
            have : label ≤ v := hL_le label hm
            exact (not_lt_of_ge (le_trans hge this)) (lt_of_le_of_ne (le_rfl) (Ne.symm hv))
          simp [fastCheckMem, hbeq, hlt, ihR label hR_ord, LabelledTree.mem, hnotL]

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      simp [fastCheckMem] at *
      by_cases hv : v = label
      · subst hv
        simp [fastCheckMem]
      · have hv' : (v == label) = false := by
          simp [BEq.beq, hv]
        simp [fastCheckMem, hv', hv] at *
        rcases h with ⟨hL, hR, hOL, hOR, hvMem⟩
        by_cases hlt : label < v
        · have : label ∈ left ↔ label ∈ node v left right := by
            constructor
            · intro hl
              simp [LabelledTree.mem, hl]
            · intro hn
              rcases hn with hl | hr
              · exact hl
              · exfalso
                have : v ≤ label := hR label hr
                exact (not_le_of_gt hlt) this
          simpa [if_pos hlt, ihL _ hOL, this]
        · have hge : v ≤ label := le_of_not_gt hlt
          have : label ∈ right ↔ label ∈ node v left right := by
            constructor
            · intro hr
              simp [LabelledTree.mem, hr]
            · intro hn
              rcases hn with hl | hr
              · exfalso
                have : label ≤ v := hL label hl
                exact (not_le_of_gt (lt_of_le_of_ne hge (Ne.symm hv))) this
              · exact hr
          have : fastCheckMem label (node v left right) = true ↔ fastCheckMem label right = true := by
            simp [fastCheckMem, hv', hv, if_neg hlt]
          simpa [this, ihR _ hOR, this] using (Iff.trans this (by rfl))

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      simp [fastCheckMem] at *
      by_cases hv : v = label
      · simp [hv]
      · have hv' : (v == label) = false := by
          simpa [BEq.beq, hv] using congrArg (fun t => decide t) (propext (Iff.intro (fun h => by cases h; exact hv) (fun h => by cases h)))
        -- simpler: just use simp
        -- but keep proof minimal:
        -- replace hv' with simp:
        -- (we'll rely on simp directly below)
        clear hv'
        have hleft : IsOrdered left := by
          simpa [IsOrdered] using h.2.2.1
        have hright : IsOrdered right := by
          simpa [IsOrdered] using h.2.2.2.1
        by_cases hlt : label < v
        · simp [hv, hlt, ihL, hleft]
        · have hge : v ≤ label := le_of_not_gt hlt
          have : fastCheckMem label (node v left right) = fastCheckMem label right := by
            simp [fastCheckMem, hv, hlt]
          -- membership direction using ordering: if label ∈ left then label ≤ v, contradict v ≤ label with label < v?
          have hLbound : ∀ x, x ∈ left → x ≤ v := by
            simpa [IsOrdered] using h.1
          have hRbound : ∀ x, x ∈ right → v ≤ x := by
            simpa [IsOrdered] using h.2.1
          have mem_left_imp_le : label ∈ left → label ≤ v := by
            intro hl; exact hLbound label hl
          have mem_left_false : label ∈ left → False := by
            intro hl
            have : label ≤ v := mem_left_imp_le hl
            have : ¬ (v ≤ label) := by
              intro hvle
              have : label = v := le_antisymm this hvle
              exact hv (this.symm)
            exact this hge
          have mem_node_iff : label ∈ node v left right ↔ label ∈ left ∨ label ∈ right := by
            simp [LabelledTree.mem]
          -- now decide by right subtree
          constructor
          · intro hf
            have : fastCheckMem label right = true := by
              simpa [fastCheckMem, hv, hlt] using hf
            have : label ∈ right := (ihR hright).1 this
            simp [LabelledTree.mem, this]
          · intro hm
            have : label ∈ right := by
              have : label ∈ left ∨ label ∈ right := by
                simpa [LabelledTree.mem] using hm
              cases this with
              | inl hl => cases mem_left_false hl
              | inr hr => exact hr
            have : fastCheckMem label right = true := (ihR hright).2 this
            simpa [fastCheckMem, hv, hlt] using this

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      rcases h with ⟨hlv, hvr, hL, hR, hv⟩
      by_cases hvlabel : v = label
      · subst hvlabel
        simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
      · have hvne : (v == label) = false := by
          simpa [beq_eq_false_iff_ne, hvlabel] using (by rfl : (v == label) = (v == label))
        have hvne' : ¬ v = label := hvlabel
        by_cases hlt : label < v
        · have hnotinR : ¬ label ∈ right := by
            intro hr
            have : v ≤ label := hvr label hr
            exact (not_lt_of_ge this) hlt
          have : fastCheckMem label (node v left right) = fastCheckMem label left := by
            simp [fastCheckMem, hvlabel, hlt]
          simp [this, LabelledTree.mem, ihL (hL), hnotinR]
        · have hge : v ≤ label := le_of_not_gt hlt
          have hnotinL : ¬ label ∈ left := by
            intro hl
            have : label ≤ v := hlv label hl
            exact (not_lt_of_ge this) (lt_of_le_of_ne hge (Ne.symm hvne'))
          have : fastCheckMem label (node v left right) = fastCheckMem label right := by
            simp [fastCheckMem, hvlabel, hlt]
          simp [this, LabelledTree.mem, ihR (hR), hnotinL]

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      have hL : IsOrdered left := by
        simpa [IsOrdered] using h.2.2.1
      have hR : IsOrdered right := by
        simpa [IsOrdered] using h.2.2.2.1
      have hleft_le : ∀ x ∈ left, x ≤ v := by
        simpa [IsOrdered] using h.1
      have hv_le_right : ∀ x ∈ right, v ≤ x := by
        simpa [IsOrdered] using h.2.1
      constructor
      · intro hf
        by_cases hv : v = label
        · subst hv
          have : label ∈ left ∨ label ∈ right := by
            simpa [IsOrdered] using h.2.2.2.2
          simpa [LabelledTree.mem] using this
        · have hv' : ¬ v == label := by
            simpa [beq_iff_eq, hv] using hv
          have hf' : (if v == label then true else if label < v then fastCheckMem label left else fastCheckMem label right) = true := by
            simpa [fastCheckMem] using hf
          simp [hv', Bool.false_eq_true, ite_eq_left_iff] at hf'
          by_cases hlt : label < v
          · have : fastCheckMem label left = true := by simpa [hlt] using hf'
            have hm : label ∈ left := (ihL hL).1 this
            exact Or.inl hm
          · have : fastCheckMem label right = true := by simpa [hlt] using hf'
            have hm : label ∈ right := (ihR hR).1 this
            exact Or.inr hm
      · intro hm
        by_cases hv : v = label
        · subst hv
          simp [fastCheckMem, beq_iff_eq]
        · have hv' : ¬ v == label := by
            simpa [beq_iff_eq, hv] using hv
          have : label ∈ left ∨ label ∈ right := by
            simpa [LabelledTree.mem] using hm
          cases this with
          | inl hmemL =>
              have hle : label ≤ v := hleft_le label hmemL
              have hlt_or_eq : label < v ∨ label = v := lt_or_eq_of_le hle
              cases hlt_or_eq with
              | inl hlt =>
                  have : fastCheckMem label left = true := (ihL hL).2 hmemL
                  simp [fastCheckMem, hv', hlt, this]
              | inr heq =>
                  cases hv (heq.symm)
          | inr hmemR =>
              have hge : v ≤ label := hv_le_right label hmemR
              have hnotlt : ¬ label < v := not_lt_of_ge hge
              have : fastCheckMem label right = true := (ihR hR).2 hmemR
              simp [fastCheckMem, hv', hnotlt, this]

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      by_cases hv : v = label
      · subst hv
        have hmem : v ∈ node v left right := by
          simpa [LabelledTree.mem] using h.2.2.2.2
        simp [fastCheckMem, hmem, LabelledTree.mem]
      · have hv' : (v == label) = false := by
          simp [beq_eq_false_iff_ne, hv]
        have hL : IsOrdered left := h.2.2.2.1
        have hR : IsOrdered right := h.2.2.2.2.1
        by_cases hlt : label < v
        · have hnot : ¬ v ≤ label := by exact not_le_of_gt hlt
          have hnot' : (label ≤ v) = true := by exact propext (Iff.intro (fun _ => trivial) (fun _ => le_of_lt hlt)) |> (by
            intro; cases hlt)
          have hmem_iff : label ∈ node v left right ↔ label ∈ left := by
            constructor
            · intro hm
              rcases hm with hm | hm
              · exact hm
              · have : v ≤ label := h.2.1 label hm
                exact (hnot this).elim
            · intro hm; exact Or.inl hm
          simpa [fastCheckMem, hv', hlt, ihL _ hL, LabelledTree.mem, hmem_iff]
        · have hge : v < label := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_gt hlt) (Ne.symm hv)
          have hmem_iff : label ∈ node v left right ↔ label ∈ right := by
            constructor
            · intro hm
              rcases hm with hm | hm
              · have : label ≤ v := h.1 label hm
                exact (not_le_of_gt hge this).elim
              · exact hm
            · intro hm; exact Or.inr hm
          have hvlt : (label < v) = false := by
            simp [lt_of_not_ge, hlt]
          simp [fastCheckMem, hv', hlt, ihR _ hR, LabelledTree.mem, hmem_iff]

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      rcases h with ⟨hlv, hvr, hOl, hOr, hvmem⟩
      by_cases hv : v = label
      · subst hv
        simp [fastCheckMem, hvmem]
      · have hv' : v == label = false := by
          simp [BEq.beq, hv]
        simp [fastCheckMem, hv', ihL, ihR]
        by_cases hlt : label < v
        · simp [hlt]
          constructor
          · intro hmem
            have : label ∈ left := by
              have : label ∈ left ∨ label ∈ right := by simpa using hmem
              cases this with
              | inl hl => exact hl
              | inr hr =>
                  have : v ≤ label := hvr label hr
                  have : ¬ label < v := not_lt_of_ge this
                  exact (this hlt).elim
            exact Or.inl this
          · intro hmem
            have : label ∈ left := by
              cases hmem with
              | inl hl => exact hl
              | inr hr =>
                  have : v ≤ label := hvr label hr
                  have : ¬ label < v := not_lt_of_ge this
                  exact (this hlt).elim
            simpa using this
        · have hge : v ≤ label := le_of_not_gt hlt
          simp [hlt]
          constructor
          · intro hmem
            have : label ∈ right := by
              have : label ∈ left ∨ label ∈ right := by simpa using hmem
              cases this with
              | inr hr => exact hr
              | inl hl =>
                  have : label ≤ v := hlv label hl
                  have : label = v := le_antisymm this hge
                  exact (hv this.symm).elim
            exact Or.inr this
          · intro hmem
            have : label ∈ right := by
              cases hmem with
              | inr hr => exact hr
              | inl hl =>
                  have : label ≤ v := hlv label hl
                  have : label = v := le_antisymm this hge
                  exact (hv this.symm).elim
            simpa using this

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem] at *
      have hLeftBound : ∀ x, x ∈ left → x ≤ v := by
        simpa [IsOrdered] using h.1
      have hRightBound : ∀ x, x ∈ right → v ≤ x := by
        simpa [IsOrdered] using h.2.1
      have hLeftOrd : IsOrdered left := by
        simpa [IsOrdered] using h.2.2.1
      have hRightOrd : IsOrdered right := by
        simpa [IsOrdered] using h.2.2.2.1
      have hvMem : v ∈ left ∨ v ∈ right := by
        simpa [IsOrdered] using h.2.2.2.2
      constructor
      · intro hf
        by_cases hv : v = label
        · subst hv
          exact hvMem
        · have hvb : (v == label) = false := by simpa [beq_eq_false_iff_ne, hv]
          have : (if v == label then true else if label < v then fastCheckMem label left else fastCheckMem label right) = true := by
            simpa [hvb] using hf
          by_cases hlt : label < v
          · have : fastCheckMem label left = true := by simpa [hlt] using this
            have : label ∈ left := (ihL hLeftOrd).1 this
            exact Or.inl this
          · have : fastCheckMem label right = true := by simpa [hlt] using this
            have : label ∈ right := (ihR hRightOrd).1 this
            exact Or.inr this
      · intro hm
        by_cases hv : v = label
        · subst hv
          have : v == v = true := by simp
          simp [fastCheckMem, this]
        · have hvb : (v == label) = false := by simpa [beq_eq_false_iff_ne, hv]
          cases hm with
          | inl hml =>
              have hle : label ≤ v := hLeftBound label hml
              have hlt_or_eq : label < v ∨ label = v := lt_or_eq_of_le hle
              have hlt : label < v := by
                cases hlt_or_eq with
                | inl hlt => exact hlt
                | inr heq => cases hv (heq.symm)
              have : fastCheckMem label left = true := (ihL hLeftOrd).2 hml
              simp [fastCheckMem, hvb, hlt, this]
          | inr hmr =>
              have hge : v ≤ label := hRightBound label hmr
              have hnotlt : ¬ label < v := by
                intro hlt
                exact not_lt_of_ge hge hlt
              have : fastCheckMem label right = true := (ihR hRightOrd).2 hmr
              simp [fastCheckMem, hvb, hnotlt, this]
